notableEvents.label: Stuart Fairchild plunked
notableEvents.detail: Stuart Fairchild hit by pitch. Travis Bazzana to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (11) 3rd base. Stuart Fairchild steals (1) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Dillon Dingler.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (11) 3rd base. Stuart Fairchild steals (1) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Dillon Dingler.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Torkelson to shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Stuart Fairchild. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd. Kerry Carpenter advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Stuart Fairchild.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (11) 3rd base. Stuart Fairchild steals (1) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Dillon Dingler.

notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith flies out to center fielder Steven Kwan.
